title: Protected-token lint enforces retired project-local knowledge tokens
description: scripts/lint-protected-tokens.ts still requires `.fabric/knowledge/` in every packaged SKILL.md and `.fabric/agents.meta.json` in the PROTECTED_TOKENS registry, while project policy has moved knowledge into mounted stores and agents.meta is derived state. Because CI and release both run this lint, removing retired store-only-era wording from skills/bootstrap/protected tokens can fail the gate even after the runtime/docs cleanup is correct. This is distinct from existing issues about stale skill text, the two-step bootstrap token set, and tooling-manifest input paths because the blocker is the gate's hard-coded mandatory token list.
fix_direction: Replace mandatory retired tokens with current store-backed contracts: require fab_recall/current MCP anchors and mounted-store/write-target wording where appropriate, remove `.fabric/knowledge/` as universal SKILL token, remove `.fabric/agents.meta.json` from registry-required tokens unless scoped as legacy/migration-only, and update lint tests plus CI expectations.

context.notes: Discovered by Round 7 dedup + issue creation worker DBP-20260609-035800

issue_history.note: Registered by Round 7 dedup + issue creation worker
